zh.lifeSummary: 當John De Barry 7th Baron於1365年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克科克時，他的父親Lord David Barry 6th Baron28歲，母親Margaret de Courcy45歲。他和Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1420年在他的家鄉享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John De Barry 7th Baron于1365年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 科克科克时，他的父亲Lord David Barry 6th Baron28岁，母亲Margaret de Courcy45岁。他和Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore至少有6个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1420年在他的家乡享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Barry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Aidan, Ciaran, Eoin, John Patrick, Kaitlin, Kieran, Murphy, Aileen, Brigid, Caitlin.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Beargha ‘descendant of Beargh’, a byname meaning ‘plunderer’.

Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Báire ‘descendant of Báire’, a short form of either of two Gaelic personal names, Bairrfhionn or Fionnbharr, both meaning ‘fair-topped’. This may also be the source of the Manx name Barry, whose family's main seat was Ballavarry in Kirk Andreas.

variants.name: Barr
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow) and northern Irish (Ulster): habitational name from any of various places in southwestern Scotland, in particular Ayrshire and Renfrewshire, named with Gaelic barr ‘height, hill’ or a Brittonic cognate of this.

English and Welsh: habitational name from Great Barr in Staffordshire. This is from Brittonic barro- ‘top, summit’, referring to Barr Beacon; there is evidence that this was known as la Bare in the 13th century.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Barre-en-Ouche in Eure, France, or perhaps from Barre-de-Semilly in Manche, France.

variants.name: Barrie
meanings: Scottish (Angus): habitational name from Barry in Angus or from another place so named, generally named with Gaelic barr ‘height, hill’, or from a British cognate of this word. This name is also the Scottish form of Barry .
French (Barrié): variant of Barrier .
Altered form of French   Baril  . Compare   Barry   7.

variants.name: Berry
meanings: Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Béara ‘descendant of Béara’, a personal name of unexplained etymology; or, in some cases, perhaps an Anglicized form of Irish and Manx Ó Beargha. Compare Barry 1.
Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Barrie  .
English: habitational name from any of several places called in Devon named with Old English byrig, dative case of burh ‘fortified manor house, stronghold’, such as Berry Pomeroy and Berrynarbor.

variants.name: Dubarry
meanings: French: variant of the topographic or habitational name Barry , with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’.

variants.name: Baril
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Normand, Alain, Armand, Ghislaine, Jacques, Jean-Marc, Jean-Pierre, Lucien, Monique, Phillippe.
French: from Old French baril ‘barrel’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a cooper, or a nickname for a rotund man. Compare Barry 7 and Berry 7.

History: Jean Baril from the Saintonge region of France was in QC by 1673, when he married Marie Guillet, the first of his three wives. He died in 1724 in Batiscan, QC. His descendants also bear altered forms of the surname, such as Barrie, Bar(r)y, and Berry.

variants.name: Bary
meanings: Walloon and northern French: variant of   Barry   8.
French (southern): rare variant of   Barry   6.
Altered form of French   Baril  . Compare   Barry   7.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament: ‘God is gracious’. See John .

en.lifeSummary: When John De Barry 7th Baron was born in 1365, in Cork, County Cork, Ireland, his father, Lord David Barry 6th Baron, was 28 and his mother, Margaret de Courcy, was 45. He had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore. He died in 1420, in his hometown, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John De Barry 7th Baron est né en 1365, à Cork, County Cork, Irlande, son père, Lord David Barry 6th Baron, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Courcy, avait 45 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore. Il est décédé en 1420, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John De Barry 7th Baron 1365 in Cork, County Cork, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord David Barry 6th Baron 28 und seine Mutter Margaret de Courcy 45. Er hatte mit Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1420 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John De Barry 7th Baron è nato il nel 1365 nel Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, il suo padre, Lord David Barry 6th Baron, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Courcy, aveva 45 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia con Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore. Morì nel 1420, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John De Barry 7th Baronが1365年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクコルクで生まれた時，父Lord David Barry 6th Baronは28歳，母Margaret de Courcyは45歳であった。彼はEllice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymoreとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1420年に故郷で55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John De Barry 7th Baron(이)가 1365년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 코르크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord David Barry 6th Baron(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Courcy(은)는 45세였다. 그는 Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1420년 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John De Barry 7th Baron nasceu em 1365, em Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, seu pai, Lord David Barry 6th Baron, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Courcy, tinha 45 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha com Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore. Ele faleceu em 1420, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John De Barry 7th Baron родился в 1365 г. в местности корк, коунти корк, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Lord David Barry 6th Baron было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Courcy, 45. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore. Он умер в 1420 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John De Barry 7th Baron nació en 1365, en Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, su papá, Lord David Barry 6th Baron, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Margaret de Courcy, tenía 45 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija con Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore. Murió en 1420, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años.
